summary: Quarterly check-in. Tom shared positive feedback on the platform overall but flagged confusion around quote tracking — he had reviewed a quote three times before signing it and his AE never followed up because the system showed 'Offline.' Tom suggested the activity panel should distinguish between 'never opened' and 'opened but no recent activity.' Jessica logged the feedback and will share with product.

transcript.speaker: csm
transcript.name: Jessica
transcript.text: Tom, thanks for making time. Wanted to do our quarterly check-in and hear how things are going.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: Sure, happy to. Overall things are good — pipeline is moving, the team's adopted the deal stages.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: One thing actually. The quote tracking thing on the deal page is confusing.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: I had a quote come in from your sales team last quarter. I read through it twice on my phone, once at home over the weekend. Then waited to hear back. Nothing.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: Eventually I called the AE and he said his system had been showing 'Offline' the whole time, so he'd assumed I hadn't engaged at all.

transcript.speaker: csm
transcript.name: Jessica
transcript.text: That's a problem. So the engagement signal didn't match what you were actually doing.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: Right. And from my side I was mildly annoyed that no one followed up. From his side I think he assumed I wasn't interested.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: I think the panel should distinguish between 'truly never opened' and 'opened but no activity in the last day or two.' That'd be more useful.

transcript.speaker: csm
transcript.name: Jessica
transcript.text: Makes sense. I'll get this in front of product. Anything else on the radar?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.name: Tom
transcript.text: Not for today. Renewal's coming up in Q3 — let's catch up before then.
